title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host talks about India's different customs and traditions. He explains how people celebrate in various states. Learn about India's rich cultural diversity. Enjoy the journey.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav makes Unnati apologise to Reet for misbehaving. Meanwhile, Sharda questions Raghav after overhearing Reet's order.

title: Vasudha
desc: Karishma sneakily gives Chandrika a sedative while the doctors put Vasudha on a ventilator. Later, Devansh comes home and attempts to wake Chandrika up.

title: Meet
desc: Tej prepares for a contest by learning culinary skills. Meanwhile, Rajvardhan proposes a match for Meet, leading Meet Ahlawat to enlist her help in bringing Deep and Isha back together.

title: Meet
desc: While Deep and Isha meet privately through a clever scheme, Meet Ahlawat attempts to block Meet from seeing Aarav. He cunningly manipulates the suitor by tarnishing her reputation.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Mahek, a talented and aspiring chef, enters a cooking competition to follow her passion. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Shaurya, the arrogant judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Durga scolds the other daughters-in-law for trying to cancel Guddan and AJ's marriage. Later on, Durga humiliates Guddan but decides to help her after she hears that Guddan is being forced to marry.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prarthana and Raunak meet by fate. She marries into a rich family but faces struggles. Prarthana works hard to save her marriage and secure her future, overcoming obstacles with determination.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist.

title: Vasudha
desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.
